positive: A maximalist celestial bioluminescent forest scene. Central composition featuring intertwined root systems and glowing flora, creating a sense of magical depth. Dominant colors are deep indigo, neon teal, emerald green, and vibrant gold accents. Elements include stylized glowing mushrooms, ethereal star dust trails, and delicate jungle leaves with iridescent edges. The art style is a mix of ornate stained-glass engraving and vaporwave bioluminescence, providing strong silhouettes and clean lines. The entire design must be visually dense, highly detailed, and perfectly scaled for modern textile printing, isolated on a deep, solid black background.
